title: Pipeline Engine: Conditional Routing, Planner Handler, Prompt Templates
description: Add three architectural capabilities to the CoBuilder pipeline engine: (1) Conditional routing via structured tool output + N-way diamond branching, (2) Unified PlannerHandler replacing research/refine/AT-writer, (3) Prompt templatization via Jinja2 templates. Plus CLAUDE.md accuracy updates.
close_reason: All 4 epics complete: conditional routing, prompt templatization, PlannerHandler, documentation

title: Epic 3: Unified PlannerHandler + Tool Sets YAML + AT-Writer Demotion
description: Create PlannerHandler (handlers/planner.py) with externalized tool sets from .cobuilder/tool-sets.yaml. Register for tab/note shapes replacing CodergenHandler aliases. Demote acceptance-test-writer from handler to worker_type on codergen. Add deprecation notices to run_research.py and run_refine.py.
acceptance_criteria: PlannerHandler dispatches with correct tool sets from YAML; infers tool_set from shape for legacy nodes; acceptance-test-writer validates as worker_type not handler; existing research/refine DOT files work unchanged.

title: Epic 1: Structured Tool Output + N-Way Conditional Routing
description: Add JSON stdout parsing to ToolHandler (parse_json_output attr), relax diamond validation from 2-edge pass/fail to N-way with arbitrary conditions, add parse_json_output property to Node in graph.py. Document the tool→diamond→branch pattern in dot-pipeline-creation.md.
acceptance_criteria: ToolHandler parses JSON stdout when parse_json_output=true; diamond nodes accept ≥2 edges with arbitrary conditions; existing pipelines pass validation unchanged; new conditional-routing example DOT validates.

title: Epic 4: CLAUDE.md + dot-pipeline-creation.md Documentation Update
description: Update cobuilder/CLAUDE.md: fix handler table, document conditions package, edge selection algorithm, conditional routing pattern, prompt templatization, PlannerHandler, tool sets. Expand ToolHandler docs in dot-pipeline-creation.md with full attribute reference, context keys, use cases, and conditional routing examples.
acceptance_criteria: CLAUDE.md handler table matches actual registry; conditions package documented; ToolHandler section has full attribute table and context keys; conditional routing pattern documented with example.

title: Epic 2: Prompt Templatization via PromptRenderer
description: Create PromptRenderer module (prompt_renderer.py) that loads Jinja2 templates from .cobuilder/prompts/. Extract research.j2 and refine.j2 from hardcoded build_*_prompt() functions. Add prompt_template/prompt_vars Node properties. Integrate into CodergenHandler._execute_sdk(). Update validation Rule 13.
acceptance_criteria: PromptRenderer renders templates with node/context/vars; falls back to literal prompt; research.j2 produces identical output to build_research_prompt(); validation accepts prompt_template as valid prompt source.
